name: fenek-portfolio-companion
description: Read-only aggregator of your portfolio data across EU-available wallets, exchanges and brokers (Trading 212, Bybit, Solana/TON). Data collection only — no recommendations.
long_description:
An unofficial, open-source MCP server that aggregates your portfolio data across wallets, exchanges and brokers available in Europe — Trading 212, Bybit, and Solana/TON wallets — and exposes it read-only to Claude for analysis. Ask about positions, pies, dividends, balances, concentration, and overlaps in plain language. Strictly data collection plus neutral metrics on your own data; it never recommends trades. No telemetry. API keys are stored in your OS keychain.

New here? After installing, run the fenek_getting_started prompt (or tool) in chat — it explains what to set up and which sources are supported, and needs no keys. All fields below are optional: fill in only the sources you have.

Not affiliated with any broker. Not financial advice.

T212_API_KEY.title: Trading 212 · API Key
T212_API_KEY.description: Read-only key from Trading 212 → Settings → API (Beta). Blank to skip Trading 212.

T212_API_SECRET.title: Trading 212 · API Secret
T212_API_SECRET.description: Shown once when you create the key.

SOLANA_ADDRESS.title: Solana · Wallet address (public)
SOLANA_ADDRESS.description: Your public Solana address (e.g. Phantom). Public, not a secret. Blank to skip Solana.

HELIUS_API_KEY.title: Solana · Helius API key (free)
HELIUS_API_KEY.description: Free key from helius.dev — only needed to read Solana holdings. Stored in your OS keychain.

TON_ADDRESS.title: TON · Wallet address (public)
TON_ADDRESS.description: Your public TON Space address (Telegram Wallet). Blank to skip TON.

BYBIT_API_KEY.title: Bybit · API key
BYBIT_API_KEY.description: Read-only key (Account/Wallet read only — no Trade, no Withdraw). Blank to skip Bybit.

BYBIT_API_SECRET.title: Bybit · API secret
BYBIT_API_SECRET.description: Shown once when you create the Bybit key. Stored in your OS keychain.
